page_content:
## Main Colors

| Color | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| **Green** | Primary frame color |
| **Gray** | Seat, basket, training wheels |
| **Black** | Tires/wheels |
| **Silver/Gray** | Metal frame parts, handlebars |
| **Yellow** | Decorative bee/smiley face elements |

---

## Objects Identified

- 🚲 **Children's bicycle** (BSA Champ/Honby brand)
- 🪑 **Padded rear seat** (light pink, with backrest)
- 🧺 **Front basket** (pink, with bee decoration)
- 🐝 **Bee decorations** (on basket and frame)
- 😊 **Smiley face** (yellow, on rear seat)
- ⚙️ **Training/stabilizer wheels** (pink, on both sides)
- 🛞 **Black rubber tires** (front and rear)
- 🔧 **Rear carrier/rack** (silver metal)
- 🎀 **Decorative elements** on handlebars
- **BSA branding/logo** on frame
